main_result: Balanced corpus of 1,000 texts across five model families and four genres
interpretation: The controlled design supports fair model-family comparison

main_result: Model-family silhouette score is close to zero/negative; theme has the strongest but weak semantic signal
interpretation: Semantic content alone does not strongly reveal model identity

main_result: 41 out of 43 stylometric features significant after FDR correction
interpretation: Stylometric features show systematic model-family differences
The stylometric signal persists across prompt genres

main_result: 86 out of 100 pairwise post-hoc tests significant after FDR correction
interpretation: Omnibus differences are driven by concrete model-to-model contrasts

main_result: Best classifier reaches 78.1% accuracy and 0.780 macro F1
interpretation: Stylometric features can predict generating model family far above chance

main_result: Interactive dashboard presents dataset, semantic maps, statistical tests, classification, and conclusions
interpretation: The project outputs are reproducible and interpretable for presentation
